suppress.notes: Netty 4.1.93 and 4.1.110 HTTP/2 and protocol handling vulnerabilities. Planned fix: Upgrade to 4.1.112+ in next sprint. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-001
gRPC 1.57.2 CVE-2023-44487 (HTTP/2 stream multiplexing DoS). Planned fix: Upgrade to 1.68.0+ in next sprint. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-002
Protobuf 3.22.3 and 3.24.4 CVE-2024-7254 (JSON deserialization). Planned fix: Upgrade to 3.25.0+ in next sprint. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-003
Kotlin CVE-2020-29582 (reflection utility). Low impact in Android client. Planned fix: Upgrade to 2.0.21 in next sprint. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-004
Commons Lang 3.16.0 CVE-2025-48924. Low impact, update to 3.17.0 when handling other dependency updates. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-005
Apache HttpClient 4.5.6 CVE-2020-13956. Low impact due to HTTPS/TLS usage and Android context. Future fix: Replace with OkHttp3. See DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md#DEPS-006
Suppress Kotlin plugin/runtime false positives reported by dependency-check (CVE-2025-29903, CVE-2020-29582). These are build/tooling transitive artifacts, not app runtime dependencies.
Suppress dependency-check false positives on kotlinx-coroutines-play-services 1.10.2 reported in CI. Track in DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md for future review.
Suppress Netty false positives reported on 4.1.93.Final and 4.1.110.Final to keep the build gate focused on app-relevant dependencies. Track upgrade/removal in DEPENDENCY_UPDATES.md.
